title: The First Defeat Begins
description: On pages 17–18, this part focuses on the first defeat begins, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The First Defeat Begins. Luffy stays behind to fight Crocodile for the first time, learning the terrifying gap between resolve and a Warlord’s power. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Oh no! The bridge at the entrance collapsed!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Why did it sink all of a sudden!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: What could've caused this to happen!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: How are we supposed to get back to the town like this!?

dialogue.speaker: Tashigi
dialogue.text: Does that mean I can't go outside!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's not that you can't go "outside,"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But rather that they can't come "inside"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Everything went accord- ing to plan...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Chopper's outside right now as the decoy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Now let's hurry, we've got a rebellion to stop.

summary: This part develops the first defeat begins and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
